title: dendranthema pacificum
intro: Dendranthema pacificum, also known as Artemisia pacifica or Pacific Sage, is a perennial herb native to the Pacific coast of North America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been found to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and pain, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Dendranthema pacificum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
